text-rendering-evaluation.description: Guidelines for evaluating prompts that require adding, modifying, or removing text.

object-attribute-verification.description: How to verify complex object replacements and specific attributes.

thematic-and-style-transformation.description: Evaluating broad thematic changes, style transfers, and environmental modifications while preserving structure.

visual-question-answering.description: Ask specific questions about visual content, style, spatial relationships, or differences between images.

vqa-query-best-practices.description: Guidelines for formulating effective, objective queries for the Visual Question Answering tool.

spatial-and-relational-reasoning.description: How to evaluate edits involving spatial positioning, counting, and object relationships.
